modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need clarification on earn codes for EPAFs.

full_description_text: I'm unsure about which earn codes to use for my EPAFs. I need guidance on the appropriate codes applicable to my situation.

description: I'm unsure about which earn codes to use for my EPAFs. I need guidance on the appropriate codes applicable to my situation.
